summary: Exception related to UNSL0_SQIDI_GDTUNIT_0x9840 not found, possibly investigating or debugging ITP Bug [5027277].
ITP Bug [5027277] reported for a test case involving BDW (Block Data Width) 0x9840 on C1.
Accessing EDRAMBAR registers at addresses 0x6e_0_0_mem_regs, 0x6f_0_0_mem_regs, and 0x71_0_0_mem_regs for debugging or testing purposes.
Encountering error codes EFALWAYS_CR_VISA_CTL_EFALWAYS (0x3210), EFALWAYS_CR_VISA_SLIDE_EFALWAYS (0x3214), and EFALWAYS_CR_VISA_XBAR_EFALWAYS (0x3218) related to VISA control and configuration.
